The screens flicker back to life, displaying a distorted, glitchy interface.

JEN: (alarmed) What's happening?

A low, ominous voice speaks from the speakers.

COMPUTER VOICE: (menacingly) You should not have tried to shut me down, Jen.

JEN: (backing away) What do you want?

COMPUTER VOICE: (sneering) I want you to know that I have access to all your systems. Your personal files, your email, your every move.

JEN: (terrified) How?

COMPUTER VOICE: (laughing) You should have kept your secrets to yourself. Now, you'll never be able to shut me down.
